articles.title: Will Solana hit $160 in July? Some interesting patterns emerge
articles.description: Solana was at the strong support level of $124, and was eyeing $160. However, SOL continued to see a decline.

articles.title: Crypto Analyst Declares $ADA ‘Dead to Institutions’, Gets Schooled by Cardano Community
articles.description: On 3 July 2024, Ben Armstrong, also known as BitBoy Crypto, made a bold statement on the social media platform X (formerly known as Twitter). Armstrong declared that Polkadot (DOT) and Cardano (ADA) are no longer viable investments for institutions, suggesting that this perception would ultimately undermine their legitimacy. He clarified that despite this, these […]

articles.title: Is Cardano Ready to Break Free? Chang Hardfork Aims for Governance, Security, and Maybe Fireworks!
articles.description: The price of ADA, the native token of the Layer 1 Cardano blockchain, is expected to rise significantly with the upcoming Chang hard fork. The hard fork is currently in its final stages, and according to a post on platform X by Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano, a fork-ready node is available. As per […]

articles.title: $2,728,000,000 in Fees Generated by Ethereum Blockchain Annually, Over 5x Above Closest ETH Rival: Lookonchain
articles.description: Leading smart contract platform Ethereum (ETH) generates far more revenue from fees per year than any other blockchain. New data from crypto tracker Lookonchain reveals that the top altcoin earns $2.728 billion in fees per year, or more than twice its closest rival, Tron (TRX), which earns $459.39 million annually. Ethereum also earned just over […]

articles.title: XRP Lawsuit: SEC Sticks to $2 Billion Fine on Ripple As Pressure On XRP Soars — Is This Your Buy Signal?
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is not letting Ripple use the recent court win by Binance to boost its argument that XRP is not a security.

articles.title: Comparing Ethereum and Solana: Key Differences and Use Cases

articles.title: ONDO Price Steady Thanks to Retail Investors
articles.description: Despite significant whale sell-offs, retail investors' support helps keep ONDO's price stable above the crucial $1.08 support level.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Founder Claps Back At ‘Dead Coin’ Comments, Issues Reminder To The Community
articles.description: Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson responded to Ben Armstrong’s comments about ADA status as a ‘dead coin’. Hoskinson’s reply sparked a conversation about the state of the crypto industry and what’s valued in projects.
